reviews.comment:
Los playeros muy desagradables....son Trabajadores gremializados ...les tenes que pedir por favor que te atiendan y limpien el parabrisas.
Muy malo, son tan lentos y desanimadoss hacia el cliente.....
En las otras YPF los chicos son ate tos y dan un servicio rápido e eficiente..acá son grandes y dwspreciagivoas hacia el cliente

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are very unpleasant... they are unionized workers... you have to ask them to please help you and clean your windshield.
Very bad, they are so slow and unmotivated toward customers.....
At other YPF locations, the guys are attentive and provide fast and efficient service. Here, they are big and disdainful toward customers.
